name: 💥 Viral TikTok Video Machine: Auto-Create UGC with VEED Avatars -vide

values.content:
=Based on these trends: {{ $json.choices[0].message.content }}

Create a viral 30-second maximum TikTok script about: {{ $('Extract Photo and Theme').first().json.theme }}

Requirements:
- Maximum 30 seconds when spoken
- Hook in first 2 seconds
- Engaging and conversational
- Optimized for voice synthesis
- No special characters or formatting
- Return ONLY the script text, nothing else

=Create an engaging TikTok caption for a video about: {{ $('Extract Photo and Theme').first().json.theme }}

Based on these trends: {{ $('Search Trends with Perplexity').first().json.choices[0].message.content }}

Requirements:
- Catchy hook in first line
- Include 5-8 relevant trending hashtags
- Keep it concise and engaging
- Optimize for TikTok algorithm
- Return ONLY the caption text with hashtags, nothing else

parameters.content:
# 🚀 VIRAL TIKTOK CREATOR - SETUP GUIDE

### 🎥 Watch This Tutorial

@[youtube](YykmUeGVb9U)


This workflow transforms a photo + theme into viral TikTok content automatically.

📋 WHAT YOU NEED:
✓ Telegram Bot Token
✓ ElevenLabs API Key + Voice ID
✓ veed.io API Key with FAL.ai 
✓ Blotato API Key
✓ Google Sheets Document
✓ OpenAI API Key
✓ Perplexity API Key

## ⚡ Setup
1. Import this workflow into your n8n instance.  
2. Connect your Google Sheets, Gmail, and Google Calendar credentials. Tutorial: [Configure Your Google Sheets, Gmail, Calendar Credentials](https://youtu.be/fDzVmdw7bNU)  
3. Connect Your Data in Google Sheets. Data must follow this format: [Sample Sheets Data](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1G1hS5pEJb4PdPYuChl_ZLNCQNH8CaG6iSa-Ip9W1cTI/edit?usp=sharing/copy)  

---
## 📬 Need Help or Want to Customize This?
**Contact me for consulting and support:** [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dr-firas/) / [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@DRFIRASS)

# 📱 STEP 1: TELEGRAM BOT SETUP

1. Create a Telegram Bot:
   • Message @BotFather on Telegram
   • Send /newbot command
   • Follow prompts to name your bot
   • Copy the API token provided

2. Configure Telegram Trigger Node:
   • Click the "Telegram Trigger" node
   • Add Telegram credentials with your token
   • Select "Updates" to trigger on: Message, Photo
   • Save the node

3. Test:
   • Activate the workflow
   • Send a photo with caption to your bot
   • Caption = theme (e.g., "fitness motivation")

✅ Ready when: Bot responds to messages

# 🔑 STEP 2: API KEYS CONFIGURATION

Configure the "Workflow Configuration" node with:

1. ElevenLabs (Voice Synthesis):
   • Sign up at elevenlabs.io
   • Get API key from profile settings : https://fal.ai/models/fal-ai/elevenlabs/tts/eleven-v3/api
   • Create/clone a voice, copy Voice ID
   • Replace: elevenLabsApiKey, elevenLabsVoiceId

2. FAL.ai (Video Generation):
   • Sign up at fal.ai
   • Get API key from dashboard : https://fal.ai/models/veed/fabric-1.0/playground
   • Replace: falApiKey

✅ All keys added to Workflow Configuration node

# 🤖 STEP 3: AI PROCESSING SETUP

1. Perplexity API (Trend Research):
   • Sign up at perplexity.ai
   • Get API key from settings
   • Add credentials to "Search Trends" node
   • Model: llama-3.1-sonar-large-128k-online

2. OpenAI API (Script & Caption):
   • Sign up at platform.openai.com
   • Create API key
   • Add credentials to both GPT-4 nodes:
     - "Generate Script with GPT-4"
     - "Generate Caption with GPT-4"
   • Model: gpt-4o

3. Use VEED : https://fal.ai/models/veed/fabric-1.0/api
   • Sign up at https://fal.ai/
   • Create fal API key

# 🎬 STEP 4: VOICE & VIDEO GENERATION

These nodes are pre-configured and work automatically:

1. ElevenLabs Voice Synthesis: https://fal.ai/models/fal-ai/elevenlabs/tts/eleven-v3/api
   • Converts script to natural speech
   • Uses your cloned voice
   • Outputs MP3 audio file

2. FAL.ai Video Generation:
   • Takes your photo + audio
   • Creates talking video (lip-sync)
   • Uses VEED Fabric 1.0 model
   • Syncs mouth movements to audio

3. Download Generated Video:
   • Retrieves final video file
   • Prepares for publishing

💡 NO CONFIGURATION NEEDED
   Just ensure API keys are set in Step 2

✅ Automatic processing - no action required

# 📤 STEP 5: PUBLISHING & TRACKING

### Install the Blotato [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas) Node in n8n (Community Nodes)
1. In n8n, open **Settings → Community Nodes**.  
2. Click **Install**, then add: `@blotato/n8n-nodes-blotato`.  
3. Log in to **Blotato**.  
4. Go to **Settings → API Keys**.  
5. In n8n → **Credentials → New**.  
6. Choose **Blotato API** 
(provided by the community node you installed).  

2. TikTok Publishing (Blotato):
   • Pre-configured to auto-publish
   • Uses caption from GPT-4
   • Privacy: Public
   • Requires Blotato API key from Step 2

# ⚡ HOW IT WORKS - WORKFLOW FLOW

1️⃣ You send: Photo + Theme via Telegram
   ↓
2️⃣ Perplexity finds: Current viral trends
   ↓
3️⃣ GPT-4 creates: 10-second viral script
   ↓
4️⃣ ElevenLabs generates: Voice audio (MP3)
   ↓
5️⃣ FAL.ai creates: Talking video from photo
   ↓
6️⃣ GPT-4 writes: Optimized caption + hashtags
   ↓
7️⃣ Saves to: Google Sheets (tracking)
   ↓
8️⃣ Publishes to: TikTok automatically

⏱️ TOTAL TIME: ~2-3 minutes
🎯 RESULT: Viral TikTok video published!

💡 USAGE:
   Send photo with caption "fitness tips"
   → Get viral fitness video on TikTok
